questions.question: What is the theme of ‘World Polio Day 2022’?

options.label: B
options.text: A healthier future for mothers and children

answer.label: B
answer.text: A healthier future for mothers and children

questions.explanation: World Polio Day is observed every year on October 24 to raise awareness about the polio vaccination and eradication of polio. The day highlights the efforts of the frontline workers who work to provide vaccines in polio-hit countries. This year, the overarching theme of World Polio Day is ‘A healthier future for mothers and children’. World Polio Day was established in 1985 to commemorate the birth of Jonas Salk, who was the lead researcher of the team that developed the first Polio vaccine

questions.question: Which cricketer has been announced as the brand ambassador for the ‘T20 World Cup for the Blind’?
questions.explanation: The Cricket Association for the Blind in India announced former India cricketer Yuvraj Singh as their brand ambassador for the 3rd T20 World Cup for the Blind. The World Cup matches will be held in the month of December. The participating countries in the World Cup for the Blind are India, Nepal, Bangladesh, Australia, South Africa, Pakistan and Sri Lanka.

questions.question: Which state/UT released the ‘SAMRIDDHI’, an one-time property tax amnesty scheme?
questions.explanation: Delhi Lieutenant-Governor Vinai Kumar Saxena recently announced a one-time property tax amnesty scheme Under the Strengthening & Augmentation of Municipal Revenue for Infrastructure Development in Delhi (SAMRIDDHI) 2022-23 scheme, the NCR people will be able to pay the principal amount of the current and pending tax of past five years for residential properties.

questions.question: Which country has formed a team to investigate ‘unidentified aerial phenomena’ (UAPs)?
questions.explanation: USA’s NASA has formed a 16-member team to investigate ‘unidentified aerial phenomena’ (UAPs) or ‘unidentified flying objects’ (UFOs). UAP refers to things in the sky that cannot be identified as aircraft or natural phenomena. The study will last for a period of nine months. The team seeks to learn how data gathered from various sources can be analysed to understand about the mystery of UAPs.

questions.question: Which country has introduced new emissions standards for new and repowered fossil fuel-fired power generation units in 2023?
questions.explanation: Singapore’s energy regulator will introduce new emissions standards for new and repowered fossil fuel-fired power generation units in 2023. The measure also follows Singapore’s plans to reduce its emissions target for 2030 to 60 million tonnes of carbon dioxide.

questions.question: How many lifestyle practises has been published by the Union government of India under Mission LiFE?
questions.explanation: The Union government published a list of 75 lifestyle practices that can be taken up as climate-friendly behaviour under the Mission LiFE (Lifestyle for Environment). The list of 75 actions are under the seven categories — energy, water saving, single-use plastic, sustainable food systems, waste reduction, healthy lifestyle, and e-waste. Prime Minister Narendra Modi and UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres launched Mission LiFE (Lifestyle for Environment).

questions.question: Which technology company announced plans to power all its devices in Europe with low-carbon electricity?
questions.explanation: Apple Inc announced it would make fresh investments to set up solar and wind projects in Europe and called on its suppliers to decarbonize business operations. With this construction in Europe, the company aims to power all Apple devices on the continent with low-carbon electricity. The company in 2020 pledged to remove carbon emissions from its entire business.

questions.question: Which public sector bank has rolled out new digital customer experience initiatives under ‘Project WAVE’?
questions.explanation: Public sector lender Indian Bank has rolled out six new digital initiatives under ‘Project WAVE’ for enhancing customer experience on its digital platform. Indian Bank, along with Universal Sompo General Insurance will provide online vehicle and health insurance through mobile banking app IndOASIS.

questions.question: ‘Summit for Democracy’ initiative was launched by which country?
questions.explanation: Election Commission of India has hosted a two-day international conference on the theme ‘Role, Framework and Capacity of Election Management Bodies’ at New Delhi. The ECI leads the Cohort on ‘Election Integrity’ which was established as a follow on to the ‘Summit for Democracy’, an initiative of US President which was hosted in December, 2021.

questions.question: As per a recent report, which country’s Defence Ministry is the largest employer in the world?
questions.explanation: The India’s Ministry of Defence is the world’s biggest employer with 2.92 million people including combined active service personnel, reservists, and civilian staff, as per the Statista infographic on employers with the largest workforces worldwide in 2022. The Indian Defence Ministry is followed by the US Department of Defense which employs 2.91 million people. In China, the People’s Liberation Army, which doesn’t include civilian positions, employs around 2.5 million people.
